detailed_description: Displays complete network adapter configuration including IP address DNS gateway DHCP status and adapter information.
Sends test packets to Google to check whether the internet connection is working.
Shows active network connections listening ports process IDs and connection states.
Shows the route packets take from the computer to Google and helps detect routing delay or packet loss.
Clears the local DNS resolver cache to fix website loading or DNS resolution problems.
Resets the Windows Winsock catalog which can fix broken socket settings caused by software VPN proxy or malware.
Resets TCP/IP stack configuration and can fix deep network configuration corruption.
Scans protected Windows system files and repairs corrupted or missing files automatically.
Repairs the Windows component store used by SFC and Windows Update.
Runs a Windows Defender quick scan to check common malware locations.
Restarts the Print Spooler service to fix printer queue and printing issues.
Opens the Microsoft Remote Desktop client.
